pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project revision property to reflect the new major version release.
Upgrade the Java source and target version to 17 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation fails or produces incompatible bytecode if the source/target remains at 11 while running on JDK 17 with strict compiler settings or if new language features are used.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Quarkus version to a release compatible with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Quarkus versions (2.4.1) may not support Java 17 features or may have runtime incompatibilities with JDK 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit Jakarta EE API dependency as it is now managed by the Quarkus BOM.
Remove the explicit MicroProfile dependency as it is now managed by the Quarkus BOM.
Remove the unused Jakarta EE version property since the dependency was removed.
Remove the unused MicroProfile version property since the dependency was removed.
Enable deprecation warnings during compilation to improve code quality.
Enable general compiler warnings during compilation to improve code quality.
Add Xlint compiler argument to enable additional warning checks.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the base Docker image from Eclipse Temurin 11 to Eclipse Temurin 17 to align with the JDK 17 migration.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.why_exists: The application is being migrated to JDK 17; running on a JDK 11 base image would result in version mismatch or failure to utilize JDK 17 features/optimizations.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Remove the -XX:+UseG1GC JVM flag as it is the default garbage collector in JDK 17.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.why_exists: While not strictly a compile error, explicit specification of the default GC is redundant in JDK 17 and removing it cleans up the configuration for the new JDK version.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Add an empty AGENT_JAVA_OPTS environment variable to allow for future agent configuration.
Reformat the RUN command in the Dockerfile to use line continuations for better readability.

src/main/docker/docker-entrypoint.sh.general_idea: Add support for AGENT_JAVA_OPTS environment variable in the Docker entrypoint script.

src/test/docker/cnj-hello-backend-quarku.general_idea: Rename environment variable from EXT_JAVA_OPTS to AGENT_JAVA_OPTS to align with updated container configuration.
